name: Fireeye AX
description: This app provides connectivity to the Fireeye Advanced Malware Analysis tool

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Run a file in the sandbox and retrieve the analysis results

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of the file to detonate

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Sets the analysis priority, default is Normal

parameters.name: analysis_type
parameters.description: Specifies the analysis mode

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Perform an analysis on the file even if the file exactly matches an analysis that has already been performed on this file

parameters.name: prefetch
parameters.description: Determine the file target based on an internal determination rather than browsing to the target location

parameters.name: enable_vnc
parameters.description: Enable VNC while submitting on a Malware Analysis appliance, default is False

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Select the Malware Analysis profile to use for analysis

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Specifies the ID of the application to be used for the analysis

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Specifies the timeout period for the analysis in seconds

actions.name: Detonate Url
actions.description: Run a URL in the sandbox

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: URL(s) to detonate. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Sets the analysis priority, default is Normal

parameters.name: analysis_type
parameters.description: Specifies the analysis mode

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Perform an analysis on the file even if the file exactly matches an analysis that has already been performed on this file

parameters.name: prefetch
parameters.description: Determine the file target based on an internal determination rather than browsing to the target location

parameters.name: enable_vnc
parameters.description: Enable VNC while submitting on a Malware Analysis appliance, default is False

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Select the Malware Analysis profile to use for analysis

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Specifies the ID of the application to be used for the analysis

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Specifies the timeout period for the analysis in seconds

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get results of an already completed detonation

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Detonation ID to get the report of

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: Get additional information from the console about this report

actions.name: Save Artifacts
actions.description: Save a ZIP file of the detonation report to the Vault

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of detonation to get the results of

actions.name: Get Status
actions.description: Gets the status of a detonation report

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Submission ID of the detonation report to get the status of
